subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1916-08-09 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: There is a tradition upon which all are in agreement, that the divines of that time shall be the most iniquitous divines beneath the shadow of the heavens [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یک حدیثی است که جمیع بر آن متفق هستند که فقهاء ذلک الزمان اشر فقهإ تحت ظل السماء
